metadata.title: Smart Connections
metadata.description: Find links to similar notes using artificial intelligence from OpenAI.

regex.source: description: "Select a model to use for embedding your notes."
regex.target: description: "选择一个模型用于嵌入您的笔记."

regex.source: description: "Select a model to use for embedding your blocks."
regex.target: description: "选择一个模型用于嵌入您的区块."

regex.source: description: "Minimum length of note to embed."
description: "Use GPU for embeddings if available."
regex.target: description: "如果有可用的GPU，则使用GPU进行嵌入."

regex.source: description: "Number of embeddings to process per batch on GPU. Use 0 to disable GPU."
regex.target: description: "每批在GPU上处理的嵌入数量。使用0禁用GPU."

regex.source: description: "Reduce max tokens depending on available resources (CPU, RAM)."
regex.target: description: "根据可用资源(CPU, 内存)减少最大标记数."

regex.source: description: "API Key required to use Cohere re-ranker."
regex.target: description: "使用Cohere重新排序器所需的API密钥."
description: "切换使用包含/排除过滤"

regex.source: description: "Require that results match this value."
description: "Exclude results that match this value."
regex.target: description: "排除与此值匹配的结果."

regex.source: description: "Performs a semantic search of the user's data. Required: hypothetical_1 and hypothetical_2. Optional: hypothetical_3."
regex.target: description: "对用户数据执行语义搜索。必需: 假设_1 和 假设_2。可选: 假设_3."

regex.source: description: "Must be distinct from and not share any breadcrumbs with hypothetical_1."
regex.target: description: "必须与假设_1不同且不共享任何面包屑."

regex.source: description: "Must be distinct from hypothetical_1 and hypothetical_2."
regex.target: description: "必须与假设_1 和 假设_2不同."

regex.source: User Agreement: By using Smart Connections you agree to share how it helps you with at least one other person
regex.target: 用户协议： 使用智能连接时，您同意至少与另一人分享它是如何帮助您的。

regex.source: The success of Smart Connections is a direct result of our community of supporters who generously fund and evaluate new features. Their unwavering commitment to our privacy-focused, open-source software benefits all. Together, we can continue to innovate and make a positive impact on the world.
regex.target: 智能连接的成功直接归功于我们慷慨资助和评估新功能的支持者社区。他们对我们注重隐私的开源软件的不懈承诺使所有人受益。共同合作，我们可以继续创新并对世界产生积极影响。

regex.source: Early access to new & experimental features:
regex.target: 提前访问新的和实验性功能：

regex.source: Early access to new versions enables supporters to help ensure new features are ready for the broader community.
regex.target: 提前访问新版本使支持者能够帮助确保新功能适用于更广泛的社区。
智能视图中的重新排序

regex.source: Advanced filters in the Smart View
regex.target: 智能视图中的高级过滤器
仅限支持者的<a href="https://chat.smartconnections.app">私人聊天

regex.source: Ask questions and share insights with other supporters.
regex.target: 向其他支持者提问并分享见解。

regex.source: Swift, top-priority support in the <a href="https://chat.smartconnections.app">Supporter Chat
regex.target: <a href="https://chat.smartconnections.app">支持者聊天中的快速、最高优先级支持

regex.source: Influence the future of Smart Connections with priority feature requests in the <a href="https://chat.smartconnections.app">Supporter Chat
regex.target: 通过在<a href="https://chat.smartconnections.app">支持者聊天中的优先特性请求来影响智能连接的未来。

regex.source: Learn about the latest features & improvements before they are announced.
regex.target: 在公布之前了解最新的特性和改进。

regex.source: For a very limited time: Early access to Smart Connect: Use ChatGPT with your notes without uploading your notes to the cloud using Smart Connect - Obsidian GPT.
regex.target: 在非常有限的时间内： 提前访问智能连接：使用ChatGPT与您的笔记无需将您的笔记上传到云端，使用智能连接 - Obsidian GPT。
关于嵌入模型的注意事项：

regex.source: IMPORTANT: make sure local BGE-micro-v2 embedding model works before trying other local models.
regex.target: 重要：在尝试其他本地模型之前，请确保本地BGE-micro-v2嵌入模型可以工作。

regex.source: Local model compatibility depends on available CPU and RAM. Try reducing the max tokens (context) if a local model if failing.
regex.target: 本地模型的兼容性取决于可用的CPU和RAM。如果本地模型出现问题，尝试减少最大标记数（上下文）。

regex.source: API models are not dependent on local compute, but they require an API key and send your notes to third-party servers for processing.
regex.target: API模型不依赖于本地计算，但它们需要一个API密钥并将您的笔记发送到第三方服务器进行处理。

regex.source: Waiting for Obsidian Sync to finish
Hi there, welcome to the Smart Chat. Ask me a question about your notes and I'll try to answer it.
regex.target: 你好，欢迎来到智能聊天。向我询问有关你的笔记的问题，我会尽力回答。

regex.source: Try "Based on my notes" or "Summarize [[this note]]" or "Important tasks in /folder/"
regex.target: 尝试 "基于我的笔记" 或 "总结[[这条笔记]]" 或 "/folder/ 中的重要任务"
